authoritySelection.welcomeTitle: Welcome to the Digital Space of Your municipal authority
authoritySelection.description: Here you can enjoy convenient, fast, and secure access to a variety of services, actions, and payments with a click against your local municipal authority. Continue to connect.

classesPage.title: Classes and Activities
classesPage.subtitle: Choose from our wide variety of classes and activities
classesPage.description: Welcome to the classes and activities page. We have gathered for you all the available classes in the authority so you can easily find the activity that suits you and your children. Discover your next class!

education.title: Education
education.description: Looking for information on kindergarten or school registration? Want to register your children for a summer camp or a club? You've come to the right place! This page centralizes all services and information on education matters in the authority.
education.kindergartenRegistration: Registration site for kindergartens and first grade
education.scheduleAppointmentText: Scheduling an appointment for the Education Department has never been easier. Click and schedule your visit with ease.

engineering.title: Engineering
engineering.description: Welcome to the digital engineering services page of the authority. Here you can get convenient access to a variety of activities and information on engineering and planning topics, such as renewing permits, viewing planning information, and submitting requests.
engineering.managerialReserveCourse: Participation in a managerial reserve course

eventsInfoCardsPage.title: Events and Activities
eventsInfoCardsPage.description: Welcome to the Authority's space of opportunities and activities! Here you can easily find and purchase tickets for exciting events, register for professional courses, participate in enriching lectures, and pay for services and fees. Discover all the options the Authority offers you.

companyInfo.title: Behind the Connection Between the City and the Authority

paragraph1.part: Muni is a new digital platform by EPR Systems (part of TSG group), a company with over 20 years of experience in providing technological solutions to local authorities in Israel. We are proud to lead the shift towards fast and efficient digital communication between residents and authorities, offering advanced tools for management and effective service for both sides.

paragraph2.part1: Muni was developed specifically for residents and local authority employees. We are committed to providing a simple, accessible, and secure user experience for residents, alongside intuitive and efficient tools for authority employees to manage services and provide quick, quality responses.

companyInfo.paragraph3: Our goal is to streamline communication between the resident and the authority and to promote advanced and accessible digital services for everyone.
companyInfo.buttonText: For more information about the company, click here
